ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cap_shapes" (
  "cap_shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cap shape */,
  "cap_shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the cap shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cap shape */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the cap shape */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this cap shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cap_surfaces" (
  "cap_surface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cap surface texture */,
  "cap_surface_name" TEXT /* Name of the cap surface texture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cap surface texture */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the cap surface texture */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this cap surface texture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_surface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cap_colors" (
  "cap_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cap color */,
  "cap_color_name" TEXT /* Name of the cap color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cap color */,
  "rgb_value" TEXT /* RGB value of the cap color */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this cap color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gill_attachments" (
  "gill_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gill attachment */,
  "gill_attachment_name" TEXT /* Name of the gill attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gill attachment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the gill attachment */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this gill attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gill_attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gill_spacings" (
  "gill_spacing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gill spacing */,
  "gill_spacing_name" TEXT /* Name of the gill spacing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gill spacing */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the gill spacing */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this gill spacing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gill_spacing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stalk_shapes" (
  "stalk_shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stalk shape */,
  "stalk_shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the stalk shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stalk shape */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the stalk shape */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this stalk shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stalk_shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veil_types" (
  "veil_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veil type */,
  "veil_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the veil type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the veil type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the veil type */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this veil type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ring_types" (
  "ring_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring type */,
  "ring_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ring type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ring type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the ring type */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly has this ring type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ring_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* The climate type of the habitat */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* An example species that commonly grows in this habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)
